brand_identity.name: 12EN12
brand_identity.target_audience: Personal training clients (Spain), coaches, operational staff

rules: Headings MUST use Barlow Condensed (load from Google Fonts)
Body text uses Inter for maximum legibility
Use UPPERCASE for H1 and H2 to convey strength
Numbers (Reps, Sets, Weights) should be 20% larger than surrounding text

layout.spacing_system: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12 (Generous padding inside cards)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full font-bold uppercase

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-border z-50 flex justify-around py-3
navigation.sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 border-r border-border bg-card h-screen sticky top-0

media.icons: Use Lucide React (default). For specific fitness icons, stick to simple, bold strokes.

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-primary-foreground is readable on bg-primary. Use white text on blue buttons.
accessibility.interactive_targets: Min 44x44px for touch targets on mobile

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' for class handling if not present.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' from Google Fonts via simple <link> tag in index.html or import in CSS.
Implement the 'Client Dashboard' as a mobile-first Bento Grid.
Implement the 'Ops Dashboard' as a dense data table view.
Use the 'Badges' visual enhancers for the Gold/Silver/Bronze/ELM plans.
Ensure the 'Nutrition' section uses the provided food images.

do_not: Use generic centered layouts for dashboards
Use default shadcn radius (customize to rounded-xl)
must_do: Keep mobile navigation accessible at bottom for clients
